name: translator-monorepo
description: LinguaSync - Neural Machine Translation Monorepo (FastAPI + gRPC + Angular)

scripts.install:backend: cd backend && python -m venv venv && .\venv\Scripts\activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:proto && npm run install:models && npm run install:frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n grpc,api,web -c cyan,magenta,green "npm run start:grpc" "npm run start:api" "npm run start:frontend"
